scenario.title: Runtime-issued source epoch and coherent bootstrap watermark
preconditions: The runtime SQLite store is initialized or safely migrated to schema v2.
Goosetower is configured with a deliberately incorrect legacy source_epoch to prove runtime authority wins.
The fake source emits the deterministic rows 4 through 11 sequence through public runtime contracts.

expected_runtime: one transaction returns current materializer records, runtime source epoch, and high_watermark 10
expected_goosetower: bootstrap cursor is 10 and row 11 reduces without a false gap or cursor regression
expected_worker_store: source cursor remains monotonic across reload and Tower restart
expected_visible: source health is live or honestly stale/offline; it never claims configured-epoch continuity

expected_runtime: SSE remains open beyond the 30-second finite JSON deadline
expected_goosetower: rows 2 and 3 retain cursor 3; Live to GapDetected is legal and retains the contiguous cursor
expected_worker_store: not_applicable: P09 owns Worker gap algebra
expected_visible: not_applicable: backend contract closure precedes later UI repair phases

required: single SQLite snapshot for records plus high watermark
zero watermark for an empty source
runtime epoch overrides configured legacy value
cursor and health transitions are monotonic
observed only; P09 owns browser cursor repair algebra
no P06 browser-store authority is introduced
observed only; no P06 UI redesign
honest stale or offline state remains required for reviewer acceptance

golden_goose_acceptance_lessons: fresh bootstrap never uses oldest-row inference
empty sources have explicit zero watermark

gooselake.reason: SQLite schema/store and authenticated HTTP now own a durable source epoch and coherent bootstrap snapshot.

goosetower.reason: Runtime client, bootstrap, SSE fan-in, and health compatibility consume runtime authority and never infer continuity from configured epoch or ascending replay.

gooseweb.reason: P06 changes no Worker, store, or React behavior.

auth_account_state.reason: The new route uses the existing runtime bearer boundary and adds no account state.

protocol_generated_code.reason: No Protobuf schema or generated code changes.

api_narrative_docs.reason: OpenAPI is regenerated and runtime API narrative documents the bootstrap, epoch, high-watermark, and old-runtime behavior.

assertions: reviewer observes honest source health at each required viewport
composer bottom remains inside the viewport
critical actions remain reachable while source health is stale or unavailable

empty.expectation: Runtime epoch is nonempty and high_watermark is zero.

loading.expectation: Bootstrap reports replaying until the coherent snapshot is installed.

stale_gap_replaying.expectation: A gap retains the last contiguous cursor and never panics.

rejection_conflict.reason: P06 adds a read-only bootstrap route.

permission_denied.expectation: The bootstrap route requires the existing runtime bearer token.

terminal_error.expectation: 404 old runtime and unavailable runtime remain offline with source_epoch unavailable.

default_fixture_leak_assertions: No fake data enters production bootstrap.
Default and production URLs contain no fixture query parameter.
fixtures.gating: P02 fake source only under test or p02-verification feature.

schema_migration.reason: Existing stores add source_metadata and safely initialize epoch/generation marker.

backfill.reason: Existing stores receive one durable epoch without rewriting runtime records.

compatibility.reason: Old/404 and unavailable runtimes are explicit offline/unavailable and cannot fake continuity.

rollback.reason: Code rollback leaves additive source_metadata harmless; old binaries ignore it.

performance.reason: One bounded bootstrap request replaces many record requests and the ascending cursor probe.

security.reason: Bootstrap excludes credentials, turn internals, and diagnostics journals and remains bearer-authenticated.

data_retention_gc.reason: Epoch metadata is durable identity and is not GC data.

deployment.reason: Tower requires the new runtime contract and explicitly reports older runtimes unavailable.

provenance_reuse.reason: Golden Goose consistent-snapshot queries/tests informed transaction design; no code was copied.

native_tauri_assumptions_removed.reason: Only the SQLite snapshot invariant was referenced.
